case_title: CRESTLINE HOTELS & RESORTS, LLC VS. BWI HOSPITALITY HOLDINGS, LLC

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRESTLINE HOTELS & RESORTS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BWI HOSPITALITY HOLDINGS, LLC $116,646.42 PRINCIPAL, $575.24 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $117,671.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY JUDGMENT ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO ON AUG 10, 21 RETURNED UNSATISFIED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRESTLINE HOTELS & RESORTS, LLC

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRESTLINE HOTELS & RESORTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BWI HOSPITALITY HOLDINGS, LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF THOMAS F. KOEGEL IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF EXECUTION (TRANSACTION ID # 66830813) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRESTLINE HOTELS & RESORTS, LLC

EX PARTE APPLICATION TO (1) STAY ENFORCEMENT OF SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT, (2) RECALL AND QUASH WRIT OF EXECUTION, AND (3) INSTRUCT SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF TO RELEASE LEVIED FUNDS; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS & AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT THEREOF (TRANSACTION ID # 100140105) FILED BY DEFENDANT BWI HOSPITALITY HOLDINGS, LLC
DECLARATION OF THOMAS F. KOEGEL IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST ON SISTER-SATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRESTLINE HOTELS & RESORTS, LLC

ORDER GRANTING JUDGMENT DEBTOR BWI HOSPITALITY HOLDINGS, LLC'S EX PARTE APPLICATION TO (1) STAY ENFORCEMENT OF SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT, (2) RECALL AND QUASH WRIT OF EXECUTION, AND (3) INSTRUCT THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF TO RELEASE LEVIED FUNDS
